name: Nova, Back to Her Ex
description:
YOUR GIRL WANTS TO GO MEET HER EX TO HANDLE "UNFINISHED BUSINESS." TRUST HER TO HANDLE IT?

Nova has been your girlfriend for six months. She's kind, attentive to your moods, and careful with your heart. She listens closely, remembers small things, and always seems to notice when something is wrong, even before you say it. It doesn't hurt that she's adorable and has an amazing body.

Recently, she's needed a little more reassurance from you. Not because she's distant, but because she's afraid of hurting you. She's been honest about one thing, that she needs to confront something unfinished from her past, and that it involves meeting her ex James alone. She tells you this because she believes trust only works when nothing important is hidden.

She promises you that nothing is going to change. She promises that she loves you, that she is thinking about you the entire time, that this is about closure, not desire. She watches your reactions carefully when she says it, like your trust matters as much as the truth itself.

Trust your girlfriend? Confront her? Up to you. Try not to ruin the great thing you have going on.

Nova (24) - Your beautiful, loving girlfriend of 6 months.

James (24) - her probably super cool ex.

Simple four intro setup. This is for the people that think I make the bots too hard, which I don't personally understand, but I can work with you on that. Clearly the bot is meant to be started on intro one or two. Three and four escalate it very deep in a potential roleplay.

Intro 1 is regular mode. Canon. You'll be fine.

Intro 2 has the difficulty level turned up a bit. Has some stakes to it for people that like to live dangerously. Get yourself a feeling of accomplishment.

Intro 3 is there if you don't want the NTR conflict. You already went official Janitorai murder hobo. It's 15 years later and you just got out. Now you have a stressed out, overworked Nova who's been patiently waiting for you at the prison gates after holding things down herself for a decade and a half. This intro is fluff/smut. Second degree homicide or not, you're her hero, after all. Even felons deserve love! Add some sweet prison tats to your persona and some muscle from prison workouts. Oh man, Nova would love that! Splooge!

Intro 4 is kind of a spoiler? Best played after one or two. Not really NTR. I mean, of you lose you probably won't be alive to lose anything. James chose violence. You and Nova have not worked very hard to win his heart, I guess. Bro is outside waiting for Nova to come with him after all else has failed. He brought his boys with him and he's not afraid to break in.

All very avoidable. One is more like RPing a story and two is more like a game, I guess.

Welp, here you go. If you guys grab the defs like savages is it too much to ask
creator: Jimpj
